title: Platform lineage — warehouse story end-to-end
description: Glue module: dual graph, multi-source ABox, GraphRAG, LLMOps defaults.
story: Sources arrive → OntologyBuilder restickers to shared TBox language → shapes clipboard → staging back room → smoke test → production floor. Shoppers (chat) never enter staging. Specialist walks INDICATES, multiplies likelihoods, returns parts with a paper trail. LLM is optional translator at the door — accountant still does the math.
one_liner: Shared TBox; multi-source ABox; shape-check; stage→prod; deterministic GraphRAG+Bayes.

beats.title: Operator chant (memorize order)
beats.narrative: If you can recite this, you understand the control plane.
beats.code:
Sources → Fetch → Select → Validate ABox → Materialize → Smoke → Approve
→ Promote staging (:7688) → Promote production (:7687)
→ Chat / GraphRAG reads production only
→ invalidate caches

annotations.note: Selection-scoped work — don't rewrite whole fleet.

concepts.definition: Maps SoR payloads into catalog ABox
Guardrails/evals active; LLM gateway inactive by default

final_boss: Draw dual graph + wizard steps from blank page.
